title: activity
description: Unified activity definition schema - combines intent matching with workflow execution

action.description: Action type: log (record message), validate (check a condition), set (assign a variable), emit (signal an event), message (display markdown content to the user)

target.description: Target of the action (e.g., variable name for set, condition for validate)

message.description: Message content for log actions or validation failure messages

description.description: Detailed guidance for executing this step

skill.description: Skill ID to apply for this step

condition.description: Condition that must be true for this step to execute. If false, the step is skipped.

checkpoint.description: Optional checkpoint ID. If present, the worker MUST yield this checkpoint to the orchestrator before executing the step.

checkpointOption.description: A selectable choice within a checkpoint

label.description: Short label displayed to the user

description.description: Detailed explanation of what this option does

effect.description: Side effects triggered when the user selects this option

setVariable.description: Variables to set when this option is selected (key-value pairs)

checkpoint.description: A blocking decision point that pauses execution and requires user input before continuing

id.description: Unique identifier for this checkpoint within the activity

message.description: Question or prompt to present to the user at this checkpoint

condition.description: Condition that must be true before presenting this checkpoint. If false, the checkpoint is skipped.

options.description: Available choices for the user. Each option may trigger variable changes, transitions, or activity skips via its effect.

required.description: Whether this checkpoint must be answered before proceeding

blocking.description: Whether this checkpoint blocks workflow execution until the user responds. Defaults to true.

defaultOption.description: Option ID to auto-select when autoAdvanceMs elapses without user intervention. Only meaningful when blocking is false.

autoAdvanceMs.description: Milliseconds to wait before auto-selecting defaultOption. Only meaningful when blocking is false and defaultOption is set.

decisionBranch.description: A conditional path within a decision point

label.description: Human-readable description of when this branch is taken

decision.description: An automated branching point that evaluates conditions without user input (unlike checkpoints which require user choice)

loop.description: An iteration construct that repeats steps or activities. forEach iterates over a collection; while/doWhile repeat on a condition.

type.description: Loop type: forEach (iterate over collection), while (check condition before each iteration), doWhile (execute then check condition)

variable.description: Name of the iteration variable that holds the current item (forEach) or loop counter

over.description: Collection or variable name to iterate over (forEach only, e.g., 'plan.tasks')

maxIterations.description: Safety limit to prevent infinite loops

breakCondition.description: If true, exit the loop early regardless of the main condition

activities.description: Activity IDs to execute in loop

workflow.description: ID of the workflow to trigger

description.description: Description of when/why this workflow is triggered

passContext.description: Context variables to pass to the triggered workflow

artifact.description: An artifact produced or updated by this activity

id.description: Unique identifier for this artifact within the activity

name.description: Artifact filename without activity prefix. The activity's artifactPrefix is prepended at write time (e.g., name 'code-review.md' with artifactPrefix '08' produces '08-code-review.md'). May contain other template variables (e.g., '{n}' for iteration count, '{decision-title}' for ADR naming).

location.description: Key into workflow.artifactLocations (e.g., 'planning', 'reviews', 'adr') or an explicit path

description.description: What this artifact contains and its purpose

action.description: Whether this activity creates a new artifact or updates an existing one

primary.description: Primary skill ID for this activity

problem.description: Description of the user problem this activity addresses

recognition.description: Patterns to match user intent to this activity

skills.description: Skill references. Load step skills via get_skill(step_id) to get execution protocol, tool guidance, and rules.

steps.description: Ordered execution steps for this activity

artifactPrefix.description: Server-computed. Numeric prefix inferred from the activity filename (e.g., '02' from '02-design-philosophy.toon'). Do not set in TOON files. Prepended to artifact filenames at write time (e.g., design-philosophy.md → 02-design-philosophy.md).

artifacts.description: Artifacts produced or updated by this activity. Bare filenames in artifact.name are prefixed with the server-computed artifactPrefix at write time. Location keys reference workflow.artifactLocations.

triggers.description: Workflows to trigger from this activity

entryActions.description: Actions to execute when entering activity

exitActions.description: Actions to execute when exiting activity

outcome.description: Expected outcomes when activity completes successfully

context_to_preserve.description: Context items to preserve across the activity

required.description: Whether this activity is required in the workflow

rules.description: Activity-level rules and constraints (string array of ordered imperative directives) that agents MUST follow during this activity. Domain-specific rules are on the skill; sequencing rules are here. Note: skill schemas use a different format (object with named key-value rule pairs).
